backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with role-based access control (admin/user), user profile management, and category/product CRUD operations with admin-only write access.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two features: creating a `useCategoryProductsInfinite` hook for paginated category products, and refactoring `CategoryPage.tsx` to use that hook with infinite scroll behavior.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, hook, page, and store in the React frontend.
frontend/docs/ii-alternative-origins-man: Manual QA checklist for verifying Internet Identity authentication works correctly on both `kelanicosmetics.es` and `www.kelanicosmetics.es` production domains, including troubleshooting steps.
frontend/docs/product-details-modal-hist: Manual QA checklist validating product details modal navigation behavior (back button, close button, ESC, overlay) across homepage, search results, and category pages.
frontend/index.css: Empty global CSS file for the frontend application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kelani Cosmetics React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading `main.tsx` as a module.
frontend/public/.well-known/ii-alternati: Internet Identity alternative origins configuration file listing the two accepted production domains (`kelanicosmetics.es` and `www.kelanicosmetics.es`) for authentication.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all search engine crawlers full site access and pointing to the sitemap at `kelanicosmetics.es/sitemap.xml`.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the homepage, contact, and privacy pages of `kelanicosmetics.es` with their change frequencies and priorities.
frontend/scripts/verify-well-known-ii-al: Short documentation stub providing instructions to verify the `.well-known/ii-alternative-origins` file is correctly served after a frontend build.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with the route tree and renders the global `ToastViewport` alongside the `RouterProvider`.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Displays an access-denied screen for non-admin users, showing their Internet Identity principal with a copy button and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminHeade: Fixed top navigation header for the admin panel that includes a sidebar toggle, branding, logout button, and a Web Worker-based session keep-alive mechanism.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Login screen for the admin panel that triggers Internet Identity authentication via a single sign-in button with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Responsive sidebar navigation for the admin panel with links to all major sections, a mobile overlay, and active-route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminVerif: Full-screen loading card displayed while admin permissions are being verified after login.
frontend/src/components/admin/categories: Mobile-friendly card list for displaying categories with inline reorder (up/down) controls and edit/delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/admin/CopyIconBu: Icon button that copies a given string to the clipboard and briefly shows a checkmark confirmation.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardN: Clickable card used on the admin dashboard to navigate to a specific admin section, displaying an icon and title.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/C: A dropdown select component for filtering products by category, fetching categories via a query hook and converting sentinel values to null for 'All categories' selection.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/D: An alert dialog that requires the user to enter a hardcoded password ('DeleteIsUnsafe') before permanently deleting a product via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/P: A card-based mobile-friendly product list view that displays product details and supports toggling store stock, featured status, copying barcodes, and triggering edit/delete actions.
A pagination control component that renders page navigation buttons, ellipsis for large page counts, and a page-size selector for the products list.
A table view of products with inline checkboxes for toggling store stock and featured status, barcode copy functionality, and edit/delete action buttons.
A modal dialog for creating or editing a product, managing form state for fields like barcode, name, category, price, stock, and photo with WebP conversion support.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Dele: An alert dialog that confirms and executes permanent deletion of a sale item using a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Sale: An alert dialog that confirms deactivation of a sale item, delegating the actual action to an external onConfirm callback.
Renders a list of sale items as cards with toggle-active, edit, and delete actions, including a deactivation confirmation dialog.
Provides a status filter dropdown (all/active) for the sale items list using a SafeSelect component.
Renders pagination controls for the sale items list, including page size selection, page number buttons, and previous/next navigation.
Displays sale items in a table with columns for product details, prices, dates, status, and active toggle, plus edit and delete action buttons.
Renders a colored Badge component indicating a sale item's status (active, upcoming, or expired) based on the result of getSaleStatus.
A dialog modal for creating or editing a sale item, with product search, price/discount calculation, date range inputs, and create/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/useP: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/admin/store-deta: Renders Save and Restore action buttons for the store details form, with disabled states based on unsaved changes and saving status.
A form component for editing store details including basic info (name, address, email, phone, WhatsApp), social media links, and store hours per day of the week.
Renders a read-only preview of store details (name, address, phone, email, hours, coordinates) formatted as they would appear on the contact page.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: A reusable dropdown component that fetches categories from the backend via `useCategoryOptions` and renders them as selectable items.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Reusable loading spinner component with configurable size, message, and inline/full-page display modes using a Lucide `Loader2` icon.
frontend/src/components/public/CookieCon: Displays a cookie consent banner with accept/decline buttons, hiding itself on the privacy page or after the user has already made a choice.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Cate: Renders a single product category section with a heading, a 'View all' link, and a responsive product card grid (limited to 4 items on mobile).
frontend/src/components/public/home/Home: Composes the homepage hero area by combining the `StoreBanner` and the `SearchBar` within a full-width layout.
Renders an infinite-scroll list of category sections on the homepage, loading more categories as the user scrolls down.
frontend/src/components/public/home/sear: Dropdown component that displays search autocomplete results, a loading spinner, an error message, or an empty state based on the current search query state.
A search bar component with autocomplete dropdown for the homepage, handling query state, keyboard navigation, result selection, and blob URL lifecycle management for product images.
A single autocomplete search result row displaying product name, category, and price (sale or regular), rendered as an accessible button with active/hover highlighting.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Stor: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, and store tagline text for the homepage.
frontend/src/components/public/product/C: A reusable button that copies arbitrary text to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a textarea fallback, showing a success toast and a temporary checkmark icon.
frontend/src/components/public/product/P: A dialog modal that displays full product details (image, price, sale badge, stock status, store selector, share button) for both ProductWithSale and HomepageSearchResult data shapes, managing body scroll lock and blob URL resolution.
A thin wrapper component that mounts ProductDetailsModal at the PublicLayout level to provide consistent modal behavior across all public pages.
frontend/src/components/public/product/S: A button that shares a product URL via the Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy, toggling a checkmark icon on success.
An expandable button group that lets users select a store and opens a WhatsApp contact link for the chosen store regarding a specific product.
frontend/src/components/public/products/: A memoized card component displaying a product's image, name, stock indicators, sale badge, and price, triggering a modal on click.
A memoized responsive grid that renders a list of ProductCard components and opens the product details modal with history on card click.
Displays per-store stock status as colored badges with tooltips (hover on desktop, tap-to-toggle with auto-dismiss on mobile) for up to two stores.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicFoo: Site footer that shows store contact info (address, phone, WhatsApp, hours) for each location fetched via `useBothStoreDetails`, plus navigation links and copyright.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicHea: Sticky top header with a hamburger menu button, the site logo/link, and a desktop-only contact navigation link.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicSid: A slide-in side navigation panel showing main links (Home, Contact, Privacy) and a scrollable list of categories fetched from the backend, with Escape-key and overlay-click close support.
Empty test file for the `SafeSelect` component with no test cases defined.
frontend/src/components/SafeSelect.tsx: A wrapper around the shadcn Select component that enforces sentinel values ('all', 'none', 'no-change') to prevent empty string errors, with utility functions for initializing state and converting sentinels to null for API calls.
frontend/src/components/seo/SeoHead.tsx: A React component that dynamically injects and manages SEO meta tags (description, Open Graph, Twitter, canonical) into the document head using useEffect, cleaning them up on unmount.
frontend/src/components/seo/seoPresets.t: Defines pre-configured SEO metadata objects for the home, contact, and privacy pages of the Kelani Cosmetics site.
Renders an individual toast notification card with type-specific icons and styles, supporting auto-dismiss with a pauseable timer on hover.
frontend/src/components/toast/ToastViewp: Renders the container for all active toast notifications by reading from the toast store and mapping each to a ToastCard component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExport.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching export statistics (category/product counts) and triggering a full data export mutation via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminImport.ts: Provides an imperative importData function that calls the backend's batchImportData method, with structured error handling for unauthorized and invalid-reference cases.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUserManagemen: Provides React Query hooks for listing managed users and mutations for promoting or demoting users to/from admin roles via the backend actor.
Verifies whether the current user is an admin by querying the backend, with a 30-day cache stored in the auth store to avoid redundant checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useBothStoreDetails.t: Fetches both store details in a single backend call using a stable actor pattern and React Query, returning ordered store details with loading state derived from actor availability.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryOptions.ts: Transforms backend categories into dropdown-compatible option objects (value/label pairs) using React Query and memoization.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsIn: Provides infinite-scroll pagination for category products by accumulating pages of results internally, resetting state when categoryId or pageSize changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsPa: Fetches a single page of category products with featured-first ordering via the backend, supporting dynamic page/pageSize parameters and a stable actor pattern.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageAutocomple: Provides debounced search autocomplete results for the homepage by querying the backend after a 300ms delay, only triggering when the query is at least 2 characters.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageCategories: Implements infinite-scroll loading of homepage categories by accumulating paginated backend results and exposing a loadMore callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInfiniteScroll.ts: Implements infinite scroll using IntersectionObserver (with a scroll-event/rAF fallback), a sentinel ref, and a cooldown period to prevent duplicate load triggers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, clear, identity, status) via an AuthClient, with idle handling disabled by default and derivation origin loaded from config.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Wraps IntersectionObserver into a hook that returns a ref and a boolean indicating whether the referenced element is currently intersecting the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaQuery.ts: Provides reactive media query matching hooks, including convenience helpers useIsMobile (≤768px) and useIsTouchDevice (hover:none/pointer:coarse).
frontend/src/hooks/useProductModalNaviga: Manages product modal open/close state in sync with browser history, pushing a history entry on open and handling both UI-triggered and back-button-triggered closes via popstate events.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductPhotoBlobUr: Converts a Uint8Array product photo into a memoized blob URL, revoking the previous URL when the photo changes or the component unmounts.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mapping utilities for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting products, supporting paginated search and sale-aware product fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductSearchForSa: Debounced React Query hook that searches products (minimum 2 characters) for use in sale item creation/editing, returning filtered results with price data.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicCategories.t: Fetches all categories for public pages using a stable actor reference, only triggering the query when a side panel is open.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all categories or a single category by ID, plus mutations for creating, updating, and deleting categories with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useRequireAdminNaviga: Redirects authenticated non-admin users to the /admin login page and exposes access and verification state for admin-protected routes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaleItemQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and utilities for paginated sale item fetching, creation, updating, and deletion, with BigInt-safe timestamp handling and sale status computation.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoreDetailsQuerie: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating store details, with helper functions to convert between backend (BigInt, JSON coordinates) and UI (number, lat/lng) representations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncAuthFromIntern: A hook that syncs the Internet Identity principal into the auth Zustand store whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useToggleProductFeatu: A React Query mutation hook that optimistically toggles a product's featured status and calls the backend updateProduct method, rolling back on error.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system, and includes toast notification animation styles.
frontend/src/layouts/admin/DashboardLayo: Admin dashboard layout component that composes the AdminHeader and AdminSidebar with a toggleable sidebar and renders child content in a constrained main area.
frontend/src/layouts/public/PublicLayout: Public-facing layout that wraps pages with a header, side panel, footer, product modal host, and cookie consent banner, rendering route content via Outlet.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected admin route component that gates access behind Internet Identity authentication and admin role verification, showing appropriate loading or denial states.
Admin page for managing product categories with search, create, edit, delete, and reorder functionality using dialogs and a table/card responsive layout.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardHomePa: Admin dashboard home page that renders a grid of navigation cards linking to major admin sections like products, categories, store details, and import/export.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExportPage.tsx: Admin page that fetches store statistics and exports product/category data as a formatted JSON file download, with BigInt serialization support and last-export tracking in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ImportPage.tsx: Admin page that accepts a drag-and-drop or file-picker JSON upload, validates and parses it (with BigInt support), then imports categories and products via a mutation hook, displaying progress and results.
frontend/src/pages/admin/OnSaleProductsP: Admin page for managing on-sale products with paginated, searchable, and filterable listings, supporting add/edit via a modal and delete via a dialog, with responsive table/card views.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductsPage.ts: Admin page for managing the product catalog with debounced search, category filtering, pagination, and responsive table/card views, plus add/edit modal and delete dialog; also loads store names for per-store stock display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StoreDetailsPag: Admin page for viewing and editing details for two stores via tabbed forms, with validation, change detection, and update mutation; initializes form state from fetched data and tracks original values for dirty-state comparison.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UserManagementP: Admin page for managing user roles, allowing admins to search users, promote them to admin, demote them to regular users, and add new admins by Principal ID. Includes access control via `useAdminVerification` and shows `AccessDenied` for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/public/CategoryPage.t: Public page that displays products belonging to a specific category using infinite scroll pagination, fetching data via `useCategoryProductsInfinite` and rendering results in a `ProductGrid`.
frontend/src/pages/public/ContactoPage.t: Public contact page that displays store details (address, phone, hours, social links) fetched via `useBothStoreDetails`, and conditionally renders an embedded Google Map based on cookie consent.
frontend/src/pages/public/HomePage.tsx: Public home page that renders a hero section and an infinite-scroll categories section, showing a loading spinner or error state while categories are being fetched.
frontend/src/pages/public/PrivacyPage.ts: Static privacy policy page that follows the app's loading pattern with a brief actor-based initialization delay before rendering the full Spanish-language privacy policy content.
frontend/src/pages/public/ProductPage.ts: Public product detail page that fetches a product by barcode, displays its image, price, sale badge, stock status, store selector, and share button, with full SEO meta tags.
frontend/src/router.tsx: Defines the application route tree using TanStack Router, organizing public routes (home, contact, privacy, category, product) under a shared PublicLayout and admin routes (dashboard, products, categories, etc.) under an AdminRoute.
frontend/src/session-worker.js: A Web Worker that sends a keep-alive message to the main thread every 60 seconds to prevent session timeouts, with support for a stop message to clean up the interval.
frontend/src/stores/authStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence for authentication state, tracking the user's principal, authentication status, and admin role with a 30-day recheck interval.
frontend/src/stores/productModalStore.ts: Zustand store managing the product detail modal's open/close state, the displayed product data, store details, and a precomputed blob URL that is revoked on modal close.
frontend/src/stores/toastStore.ts: Zustand store for managing toast notifications with type-based default durations, plus convenience helper functions (toast.success, toast.error, etc.) for triggering toasts.
frontend/src/utils/adminDate.ts: Provides utility functions for converting between HTML date input strings, JavaScript Date objects, and nanosecond BigInt timestamps used by the Internet Computer backend, including validation and display formatting helpers.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.te: Empty test file placeholder for ApiResponseHandler utilities.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.ts: Provides standardized API response handling with BigInt-aware JSON parsing, a custom ApiError class, error creation helpers, and retry logic for failed HTTP requests.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.test: Empty test file placeholder for BigIntSerializer utilities.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.ts: Utilities for safely converting between BigInt and string representations, including a custom JSON parser that automatically converts timestamp fields to BigInt to preserve ICP nanosecond precision.
frontend/src/utils/categoryNumeric.ts: Provides safe conversion utilities between UI number types and Candid bigint types for Category fields, including helpers for converting reorder arrays.
frontend/src/utils/cookieUtils.ts: Manages GDPR cookie consent preferences using localStorage, exposing functions to get, set, and check consent status with a custom event for UI updates.
frontend/src/utils/googleMaps.ts: Parses JSON coordinate strings and generates Google Maps directions URLs from latitude/longitude data.
frontend/src/utils/imageWebp.ts: Provides image validation (type and size), conversion of image files to WebP format via canvas, and blob URL management utilities.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.test: Empty test file for importValidation utilities.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.ts: Validates and converts imported JSON data (categories and products) to the correct backend types, with strict BigInt timestamp handling and detailed Spanish-language error messages.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.test: Empty test file placeholder for NumericConverter utilities.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.ts: Provides safe numeric conversion and validation helpers including IVA value validation (0, 4, 10, 21), profit margin range checks, stock-to-boolean conversion, and Spanish-formatted price display.
frontend/src/utils/phoneFormat.ts: Formats phone numbers for display and for WhatsApp wa.me API links by stripping non-numeric characters and normalizing country codes.
frontend/src/utils/productImage.ts: Provides a default product image URL fallback and a helper to check whether a product has real photo data.
Wraps error, warning, success, and info reporting by logging details to the console and displaying user-friendly toast notifications.
frontend/src/utils/storeDetailsValidatio: Defines validation logic for store details form fields including email, phone, WhatsApp, coordinates, and store hours, returning structured error messages.
frontend/src/utils/storeHoursFormat.ts: Formats store hours data for display, mapping English day keys to Spanish labels and translating individual day names.
frontend/src/utils/throttle.ts: Implements a generic throttle function that limits how often a callback can be invoked, scheduling a trailing call if invocations occur within the delay period.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappContact.ts: Provides helpers to build a Spanish-language WhatsApp message for a product inquiry and open the resulting wa.me URL in a new tab.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, registers typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and extends the theme with custom OKLCH color tokens, font families, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3), documenting an in-progress refactor of the public category page to use a new `useCategoryProductsInfinite` hook that fixes product disappearance during infinite-scroll pagination.
